title: Create a View from Pipeline Results

sections.heading: About this Task
sections.body: Creating a view does not save the aggregation pipeline itself.

sections.heading: Step 1: Click the  drop-down button.
sections.body:
- Select the collection.

- In the aggregation pipeline pane, click the **Save**
  drop-down button and select **Create view**.

![Save drop-down button](/atlas-ui/images/atlas-ui/compass/query-save-pipeline.png)

sections.heading: Step 2: Enter a name for your view.
sections.body: The view name must be between 6 and 1024 characters long.

sections.heading: Step 3: Create your view.
sections.body:
Click the **Create** button to create your view. Atlas
creates a view from your pipeline results in the same database where the
pipeline was created and displays saved views with the eye eye
icon.
